result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `Main.kt`:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — parses both commit files, compares blob hashes, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working files from blobs, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — updates HEAD and clears index without touching working files
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the index, fails if not present
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent
